about.title: Prisma Clinic
about.body: Prisma Clinic Marbella is a modern dental and aesthetics clinic located in the heart of Marbella, dedicated to providing high-quality care in a serene, luxurious environment. We specialize in comprehensive dental services—from routine checkups and cosmetic dentistry to advanced treatments. Our aesthetics division offers personalized non-surgical treatments such as dermal fillers and Botox to enhance natural beauty with subtle, effective results. For your peace of mind, we also provide 24/7 emergency dental care, ensuring expert support is always available when you need it most. At Prisma, your comfort, confidence, and well-being come first.

testimonialsGrid.title: What people are saying about us
testimonialsGrid.description: Real reviews that can be checked on Google

items.name: Ellinor Myhren
items.text: Excellent service and results! Everything is done with great care and professionalism. I'm a regular client at this amazing clinic. I did my veneers here and keep coming back for my cleanings and Botox. They have two departments, one for dental care and one for aesthetics, both super professional and friendly. Highly recommended!

items.name: Shahin gh
items.text: I had a great experience at Prisma Clinic. You are seen directly by a specialist doctor who approaches her work with both medical expertise and an artistic eye. She pays close attention not only to your health but also to aesthetic detail, which makes a real difference in the results. I felt well cared for throughout my visit, and I will definitely come back again.

items.name: Kate M
items.text: I'm just thrilled with the treatment. The doctor was just amazing. Before that, I was very afraid of dentists, but the doctor is really professional; he was genuinely interested in whether I was okay, the work was at the highest level, and I want to return to this place in the future so that the doctor can take care of my teeth. The doctor listened to me and explained all his actions, it was an emergency on Saturday evening due to a broken tooth, the doctor is patient and very professional. Dr. Robbin is very kind, friendly and helpful. I highly recommend it!

items.name: Hazhir Javadi
items.text: I would highly recommend Prisma Clinic in Marbella! I have just completed my treatment and cannot express enough gratitude for the professional service and fantastic care I received. From the very first visit, I felt well taken care of. The friendly and knowledgeable staff made the entire experience much more reassuring. The treatment was carried out meticulously, and I truly appreciate the time and attention given to explain each step of the process. A big thank you to the whole team at Prisma Clinic for making my dental care experience so positive!

items.name: India Keely
items.text: 5 star emergency service on Easter weekend. The skill, expertise and support I was given whilst in horrible pain with an infected tooth was fantastic. The understanding and knowledge of the dentist, who had trained at Kings College London and who is also a dental surgeon was both reassuring and welcome in an emergency situation. A difficult tooth extraction was done with patience and care. I highly recommend this practice for both emergency and routine dental work.

items.name: Krzysztof Krzymowski
items.text: Very good, professional and nice, recommended in 100%

items.name: R Faul
items.text: I have always been very afraid of going to the dentist, but I am so much more confident after visiting Prisma. The care you receive is amazing and the staff go above and beyond to make you feel at ease. Highly recommended!

locations.title: Where to Find Us
locations.description: We're located in the heart of Andalucía! You can find us both in Puerto Banús and Marbella Old Town.

hero.title: Modern medicine, designed to feel personal.
hero.lead: Prisma Clinic Marbella is where high-end dentistry, aesthetic medicine, and everyday healthcare meet — under one calm, considered roof.
hero.body1: We started Prisma to make exceptional medical care feel as warm as it is precise. Two locations in the heart of Marbella, one team of specialists, and a simple promise: every patient leaves with more comfort, confidence, and trust than they walked in with.
hero.body2: From routine check-ups to complex aesthetic protocols, we treat the small details with the same care as the big ones.

values.title: Three principles, one feeling.
values.description: Everything from how we welcome you at the door to how we close the last appointment of the day comes back to these.

excellence.title: Quiet excellence
excellence.description: World-class equipment, used with calm precision. We invest in mastery so you don't have to think about it.

comfort.title: Designed for comfort
comfort.description: Soft lighting, unhurried appointments, clear explanations. Every detail is shaped around how you'd want to feel.

personal.title: Personal, not procedural
personal.description: Treatments built around your face, your health, your story — never a template. We listen first, plan together.

specialties.title: Three disciplines, one coordinated team.
specialties.description: Everything you need for longevity, beauty, and quality of life — handled by specialists who actually talk to each other.

dental.title: Dental & Cosmetic Dentistry
dental.description: Routine care, veneers, implants, and 24/7 emergency dental care.

aesthetics.title: Aesthetic & Anti-Aging
aesthetics.description: Non-surgical rejuvenation, dermal fillers, Botox, PRP, and longevity protocols.

general.title: General Medicine
general.description: Primary care, health optimization, and preventive medicine for everyday well-being.

team.title: Care with a name behind it.
team.description: Behind every result is a doctor who chose this work as a vocation — and a team that takes it personally.

lead.name: Dr. Bozana Krivošija
lead.bio: Medical doctor specialized in Aesthetic and Anti-Aging Medicine, trained at the Complutense University of Madrid. Originally from Bosnia and based in Spain for over a decade, Dr. Bozana focuses on natural, elegant results — neuromodulators, hyaluronic acid, collagen stimulators, PRP, IV drips, and tailored anti-aging protocols.

lead2.name: Dr. Robbin
lead2.bio: Dental surgeon trained at King's College London, with deep expertise in cosmetic dentistry, complex restorations, and 24/7 emergency dental care. Patients describe Dr. Robbin as patient, kind, and meticulous — explaining every step, and treating each case with the same level of attention whether it's a routine cleaning or a Saturday-night emergency.

team.rest: Alongside Dr. Bozana and Dr. Robbin, our dental and general medicine specialists bring decades of combined experience — including emergency-trained surgeons and clinicians fluent in at least one of Spanish, English, Swedish, German, or Farsi.

cta.title: Come visit us
cta.description: Two locations in Marbella, open 24/7 for emergencies. Book a consultation, or just send us a message — we'll take it from there.

page.title: Our Services
page.subtitle: Comprehensive healthcare solutions in Marbella
page.description: Prisma Clinic Marbella provides a wide range of premium medical and dental services, including emergency care available 24/7. Our team of specialists is dedicated to providing exceptional care using cutting-edge technology.

testimonial.content: The team at Prisma Clinic Marbella transformed my dental experience. Their professional approach and state-of-the-art technology made my treatment comfortable and effective. I couldn't be happier with the results.

dental.title: Premium Dental Services
summary: Our dental department offers a comprehensive range of services including general dentistry, cosmetic treatments, implants, orthodontics, and 24/7 emergency dental care.
Using the latest technology and the most advanced techniques, our experienced dentists provide personalized treatment plans to maintain and improve your oral health and smile's aesthetics.

testimonial.author: Maria L.
testimonial.content: The dental care at Prisma Clinic is exceptional. From regular check-ups to my recent cosmetic procedure, the team has always provided professional and comfortable treatment.

aesthetics.title: Advanced Aesthetic Treatments
summary: Our aesthetics department specializes in non-surgical rejuvenation treatments, including Botox, dermal fillers, lip enhancement, and other facial aesthetic procedures.
Our qualified specialists create natural-looking results that enhance your features while maintaining facial harmony, helping you achieve a rejuvenated and youthful appearance.

testimonial.author: Sofia R.
testimonial.content: The aesthetic treatments at Prisma Clinic delivered exactly what I wanted: a subtle improvement that looks completely natural. The experience and attention to detail of the team is outstanding.

hero.headline: Transform Your Beauty with Premium Aesthetic Treatments
hero.description: Experience state-of-the-art aesthetic care in Marbella. Our expert team offers personalized treatments to enhance your natural beauty and boost your confidence.

category1.headline: Facial Harmonization
category1.description: Achieve perfectly balanced facial proportions with our advanced filler treatments and comprehensive harmonization techniques. Our expert practitioners use premium dermal fillers to enhance your natural features, restore volume, and create harmonious facial symmetry that looks completely natural.

features.title: Dermal Fillers
features.description: Premium hyaluronic acid fillers to restore volume, smooth wrinkles, and enhance facial contours. Customized treatment plans for natural-looking results.

features.title: Full Facial Harmonization
features.description: Comprehensive facial balancing that considers your entire face structure. Achieve perfect proportions and symmetry through strategic filler placement.

features.title: Natural Results
features.description: Our experienced practitioners ensure subtle, natural-looking enhancements that preserve your unique features while achieving facial harmony.

category2.headline: Botox
category2.description: Experience the power of Botox treatments for wrinkle reduction, facial lifting, and rejuvenation. Our 5-point lifting technique targets key areas for a natural, youthful lift, while general Botox treatments smooth fine lines and prevent future wrinkles.

features.title: 5-Point Lifting
features.description: Advanced non-surgical lifting technique targeting five strategic points on the face. Achieve a natural, youthful lift that opens and rejuvenates your appearance without surgery.

features.title: General Botox
features.description: Precision Botox injections to smooth wrinkles, fine lines, and expression lines. Effective for forehead, crow's feet, and frown lines with minimal downtime.

features.title: Preventive Treatment
features.description: Early Botox treatments can prevent deep wrinkles from forming, helping you maintain youthful-looking skin for longer with regular maintenance.

category3.headline: Anti Aging & Health
category3.description: Comprehensive rejuvenation treatments that work from within to restore your skin's vitality and overall health. From advanced cellular therapy to targeted body contouring, our anti-aging and health treatments promote long-term wellness and beauty.

features.title: Advanced Cellular Therapy
features.description: Cutting-edge treatments including Exosomes and PRP therapy that harness your body's natural healing capabilities for comprehensive skin rejuvenation and regeneration.

features.title: Skin Rejuvenation
features.description: Bio Revitalization and Skin Boosters deliver deep hydration, improve skin texture, and stimulate collagen production for radiant, youthful-looking skin from within.

features.title: Body Contouring & Wellness
features.description: Fat Dissolution treatments for targeted body sculpting, combined with PRP therapy for overall health benefits and enhanced skin quality.

doctor.title: MEET OUR DOCTOR
doctor.bio: Dr. Bozana Krivošija is a medical doctor specialized in Aesthetic and Anti-Aging Medicine, trained at the Complutense University of Madrid. Originally from Bosnia and living in Spain for over 11 years, she is committed to offering natural, elegant, and personalized results with a delicate, safe, and professional approach. Dr. Bozana specializes in neuromodulators, hyaluronic acid, collagen stimulators, PRP, IV drips, and tailored anti-aging protocols. Fluent in Serbian, Spanish, and English, she creates a warm, trustworthy experience for patients from diverse cultures, seeing medicine not only as a career but as a true vocation of service and care.

items.title: Facial Harmony
items.description: Comprehensive facial balancing with dermal fillers to achieve perfect proportions and natural-looking symmetry.

items.title: 5-Point Lifting
items.description: Advanced non-surgical lifting technique targeting five strategic points for a natural, youthful lift.

items.title: Bio Revitalization
items.description: Deep skin hydration and regeneration treatment that restores your skin's natural glow and elasticity.

items.title: Exosomes
items.description: Advanced cellular therapy for comprehensive skin rejuvenation using cutting-edge regenerative technology.

items.title: PRP Treatment
items.description: Platelet-Rich Plasma therapy that harnesses your body's natural healing capabilities for skin and hair rejuvenation.

items.title: Fat Dissolution
items.description: Non-surgical reduction of localized fat deposits for targeted body contouring and sculpting.

items.content: The aesthetic treatments at Prisma Clinic delivered exactly what I wanted: a subtle improvement that looks completely natural. The experience and attention to detail of the team is outstanding.

hero.title: Aesthetic & Anti-Aging Treatments
hero.description: Surgical and non-surgical aesthetic treatments with precision, safety and personalised care in Marbella.
hero.imageAlt: Aesthetic treatment at Prisma Clinic Marbella

interest.title: Advanced aesthetic medicine tailored to your goals
interest.subheadline: World-class surgical expertise and minimally invasive treatments for refreshed, confident results.
interest.body: At Prisma Clinic our aesthetic practice combines decades of surgical experience with the latest non-surgical techniques. From hair transplants to fillers, botox and body contouring, we deliver predictable, natural outcomes with a focus on safety, rapid recovery and long-term results. Treatment plans are personalised to your facial proportions and lifestyle so you look like the best version of yourself.

ourServices.title: Our Services
ourServices.body: We offer a full spectrum of aesthetic care: hair and brows transplants, body contouring, hair restoration, plus non-surgical treatments — dermal fillers, anti-wrinkle injections, PRP and medical-grade skin rejuvenation. All procedures use evidence-based techniques and modern protocols for comfort and safety.

leadExpert.title: Dr. Bozana Krivošija
leadExpert.body: Dr. Bozana Krivošija is a medical doctor specialised in Aesthetic and Anti-Aging Medicine, trained at the Complutense University of Madrid. Originally from Bosnia and based in Spain for over a decade, she focuses on natural, elegant, and personalised results — neuromodulators, hyaluronic acid, collagen stimulators, PRP, IV drips, and tailored anti-aging protocols. Fluent in Serbian, Spanish, and English, Dr. Bozana creates a warm, trustworthy experience for patients from diverse cultures, treating medicine not just as a career but as a true vocation of service and care.
leadExpert.imageAlt: Dr. Bozana Krivošija, aesthetic and anti-aging medicine specialist at Prisma Clinic Marbella

testimonial.content: Having access to reliable primary care at Prisma Clinic has made managing my health so much easier. The personal attention and comprehensive approach is exactly what I needed.

services.description: Dental emergencies can happen at any time. At Prisma Clinic Marbella, we provide immediate care for all dental emergencies, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Our team of specialists is always ready to provide prompt treatment to relieve your pain and address urgent dental issues.

testimonial.quote: I had a terrible toothache at 2 AM and didn't know what to do. I called Prisma Clinic Marbella's emergency line, and they saw me right away. The pain was gone within an hour, and I received exceptional care. I am so grateful they're available 24/7!

interest.title: Comprehensive primary and urgent care for you and your family
interest.subheadline: Fast, professional assessments and treatments, day or night.
interest.body: Prisma Clinic offers accessible general medicine services focused on timely evaluations, evidence-based prescriptions and clear follow-up care. Our team provides thorough assessments for acute issues, chronic condition checks, travel and preventive health advice, and IV therapy for rehydration and recovery. We prioritise rapid access, practical treatment plans and coordinated referrals when specialist care is needed.

ourServices.title: Our Services
ourServices.body: Clear, evidence-based care across primary, urgent and preventive medicine — with documentation and referrals coordinated for you when specialist input is needed.

items.title: After-Hours Consultations
items.description: Evening and weekend appointments and home-visit coordination for when you need care most.

items.title: Urgent Evaluations

items.title: Prescription Management

items.title: Routine Physicals
items.description: Comprehensive checkups for travel, work, lifestyle changes or peace of mind.

items.title: Chronic Disease Care
items.description: Coordinated, ongoing management of long-term conditions with specialist referrals as needed.

leadExpert.title: Our Medical Team
leadExpert.body: Prisma Clinic's general medicine team comprises experienced physicians and licensed clinicians committed to timely, evidence-based care. While we are currently hiring a permanent general practitioner, our clinicians follow strict clinical protocols for safe assessments, prescriptions and IV therapies, and work closely with local hospitals and specialists to ensure continuity of care.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie Consent
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.
cookieBanner.necessaryDescription: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They enable basic features like page navigation and access to secure areas.
cookieBanner.analyticsDescription: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
cookieBanner.marketingDescription: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant and engaging advertisements.
cookieBanner.learnMore: Learn more about our cookie policy

interest.title: Comprehensive dental care tailored to you
interest.subheadline: Modern treatments, personalised plans, results you can trust.
interest.body: At Prisma Clinic we combine cutting-edge dental technology with compassionate care. Whether you need a single implant, aesthetic smile enhancement, or expert endodontic treatment, our team creates a clear, comfortable plan that fits your goals and schedule. We focus on minimally invasive techniques, fast recovery, and long-lasting results so you can enjoy your smile and local life again.

ourServices.title: Our Services
ourServices.body: From precision dental implants and advanced endodontics to cosmetic dentistry and routine hygiene, we offer a full range of treatments delivered by specialists using digital diagnostics and implant-grade materials.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-feeling solutions for missing teeth that restore full function and confidence.

items.title: Endodontics
items.description: Modern root canal therapy that saves natural teeth comfortably, with minimal post-op discomfort.

items.title: Veneers
items.description: Custom porcelain shells that transform your smile with minimal preparation of the natural tooth.

items.title: Teeth Whitening
items.description: Professional whitening treatments for a brighter, fresher smile with safe, predictable results.

items.title: Crowns & Bridges
items.description: Durable, natural-looking restorations for damaged or missing teeth, built to last.

items.title: Preventive Checkups
items.description: Regular reviews, hygiene and digital scans to catch issues early and keep treatment minimal.

leadExpert.title: Dr. Robbin M.
leadExpert.body: Dr. Robbin M. is a dental specialist with over 10 years' experience in endodontics, dental implants and aesthetic dental solutions. A King's College London graduate, he combines specialist training with a gentle, patient-first approach. Dr. Robbin is known for predictable implant outcomes, pain-minimising root canal procedures and natural-looking cosmetic results — always tailored to each patient's facial balance and lifestyle.
leadExpert.imageAlt: Dr. Robbin M., dental specialist at Prisma Clinic Marbella
